attributes.Strength: Increases the damage dealt by physical attacks and techniques.
attributes.Defense: Reduces the damage taken from physical attacks.
attributes.Spirit: Increases the damage dealt by magical techniques and affects maximum MP.
attributes.Wisdom: Improves magical hit rate, evasion against magic, and reduces damage taken from magical attacks.
attributes.Speed: Determines turn order in battle and improves overall evasion rate.
attributes.Charisma: Increases Digimon popularity, lowers shop prices, and allows battling certain Tamers.

resistances.Fire: Reduces damage taken from Fire-elemental techniques.
resistances.Water: Reduces damage taken from Water-elemental techniques.
resistances.Ice: Reduces damage taken from Ice-elemental techniques.
resistances.Wind: Reduces damage taken from Wind-elemental techniques.
resistances.Thunder: Reduces damage taken from Thunder-elemental techniques.
resistances.Machine: Reduces damage taken from Machine-elemental techniques.
resistances.Dark: Reduces damage taken from Dark-elemental techniques.
